data.title: Global Uranium Corp. Launches C$1M Private Placement for Exploration
data.description:
Global Uranium Corp. ( (TSE:GURN) ) has provided an update.

Global Uranium Corp. announced a non-brokered private placement to raise up to C$1,000,000 through the sale of units, each consisting of one common share and a warrant to purchase an additional share. The funds will be used for exploration activities, including at the Northwest Athabasca Project, and for general corporate purposes. The offering is subject to regulatory approvals and is expected to close by April 25, 2025.

More about Global Uranium Corp.

Global Uranium Corp. focuses on exploring and developing uranium assets primarily in North America. The company holds key uranium projects including the Wing Lake Property in Northern Saskatchewan, Canada, the Northwest Athabasca Joint Venture in Saskatchewan, Canada, and several district projects in Wyoming, USA.

YTD Price Performance: -80.32%

Average Trading Volume: 519,200

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: C$6.45M

Learn more about GURN stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: ENGIE Finalizes Nuclear Agreement with Belgian Government
data.description:
An announcement from Engie SA ( (FR:ENGI) ) is now available.

ENGIE has finalized an agreement with the Belgian government to extend the operation of the Tihange 3 and Doel 4 nuclear reactors for 10 years and transfer nuclear waste responsibilities to the government. This agreement, approved by the European Commission, includes a joint venture ownership of the reactors and a contract for difference mechanism, reducing ENGIE’s exposure to future waste treatment costs.

More about Engie SA

ENGIE is a leading company in the energy transition sector, focused on accelerating the shift towards a carbon-neutral economy. With operations in 30 countries and a workforce of 98,000 employees, ENGIE’s activities span the entire energy value chain, including renewable electricity and green gas production, energy transmission and distribution, and local energy infrastructures. The company invests over €10 billion annually to support its net-zero carbon goal by 2045 and is publicly traded on the Paris and Brussels stock exchanges.

YTD Price Performance: 12.71%

Average Trading Volume: 2,563,951

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: €41.65B

data.title: BW LPG Limited Updates 2025 Financial Calendar
data.description:
BW LPG Ltd ( (GB:0QIX) ) has issued an update.

On March 14, 2025, BW LPG Limited announced its updated financial calendar for the upcoming year. The company plans to release its 2024 Annual Report on March 28, 2025, followed by its Annual General Meeting on May 15, 2025. The quarterly and half-yearly reports for 2025 are scheduled for May 20, August 26, and December 2. This announcement provides stakeholders with a clear timeline for the company’s financial disclosures, which is crucial for maintaining transparency and investor confidence.

More about BW LPG Ltd

BW LPG is the world’s leading owner and operator of LPG vessels, specializing in Very Large Gas Carriers (VLGC) with a total carrying capacity exceeding 4 million CBM. With over five decades of experience in LPG shipping, the company also has an in-house LPG trading division and is expanding its presence in LPG terminal infrastructure and distribution. BW LPG is part of the BW Group, a global maritime leader with a fleet of over 450 vessels and investments in renewable energy.

Average Trading Volume: 33,625

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Hold

Current Market Cap: NOK16.95B

data.description:
An announcement from Unite Group plc ( (GB:UTG) ) is now available.

data.title: Foresight Ventures VCT PLC Expands Equity Through Dividend Reinvestment
data.description:
Downing ONE VCT ( (GB:FVEN) ) has provided an announcement.

Foresight Ventures VCT PLC, a company involved in venture capital trusts, announced the issuance of 235,019 Ordinary Shares under its Dividend Reinvestment Scheme at a price of 96.5p per share. This move is part of the company’s strategy to enhance shareholder value by reinvesting dividends into equity. The newly allotted shares are set to be admitted to the Official List of the UK Listing Authority and traded on the London Stock Exchange, increasing the total number of shares in issue to 106,317,317. This development reflects the company’s commitment to providing growth opportunities for its investors.

data.title: Distribution Finance Capital Holdings Plc Announces Change in Major Holdings
data.description:
Distribution Finance Capital Holdings Plc ( (GB:DFCH) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Distribution Finance Capital Holdings Plc, a UK-based company, has announced a change in its major holdings. Davidson Kempner Capital Management LP, a US-based investment firm, has adjusted its voting rights in the company, reducing its stake from 12.96% to 11.93%. This adjustment in holdings could impact the company’s governance and influence the strategic decisions made by the board, potentially affecting stakeholders and market perception.

data.title: Giant Mining Corp. Prepares for Majuba Hill Drilling Amid Rising Metal Prices
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Giant Mining Corp ( (TSE:BFG) ).

Giant Mining Corp. announced the commencement of final site preparations for its drilling program at the Majuba Hill Copper-Silver-Gold Project in Nevada. With gold prices nearing record highs and copper prices rising, the company is poised for a significant year of exploration and development, fully funded to enhance its resource estimates with over 100 drill holes planned.

More about Giant Mining Corp

Giant Mining Corp. operates in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of copper, silver, and gold resources. The company is engaged in projects like the Majuba Hill Porphyry Copper Deposit in Nevada, aiming to expand its mineral resource estimates.

data.title: Albion Crown VCT PLC Reports Mixed Half-Yearly Financial Results
data.description:
The latest update is out from Crown Place VCT ( (GB:CRWN) ).

Albion Crown VCT PLC has released its half-yearly financial report for the six months ending December 31, 2024. The report highlights a slight loss in ordinary shares, with a net asset value decrease to £92.6 million, and a dividend of 0.81 pence per share paid during the period. C shares, however, showed a positive return, with a net asset value of £58.0 million and a dividend of 1.08 pence per share declared. This financial performance indicates a mixed outcome for the company, with ordinary shares experiencing a minor decline while C shares demonstrate growth, potentially impacting investor sentiment and future strategic decisions.

More about Crown Place VCT

Average Trading Volume: 2,500

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

data.title: Alternative Income REIT Plc Announces Share Sale by Glenstone REIT
data.description:
An announcement from Alternative Income REIT Plc ( (GB:AIRE) ) is now available.

Alternative Income REIT Plc announced the sale of 150,000 ordinary shares at a price of £0.69816 each, totaling £104,724.00. This transaction, conducted on the London Stock Exchange, involves Glenstone REIT plc, a person closely associated with Adam C Smith, highlighting the ongoing financial activities and adjustments within the company’s shareholder structure.

Alternative Income REIT Plc operates in the real estate investment trust (REIT) industry, focusing on generating income through a diversified portfolio of real estate assets. The company primarily invests in properties that offer alternative income streams, catering to a variety of market segments.

data.title: Coca-Cola HBC Releases 2024 Integrated Annual Report Highlighting Sustainability and Governance
data.description:
Coca Cola HBC ( (GB:CCH) ) just unveiled an update.

Coca-Cola HBC AG has released its 2024 Integrated Annual Report, emphasizing advancements in business, governance, and sustainability. The report aligns with the Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive and includes crucial information on the company’s risks, transactions, and governance. This release highlights Coca-Cola HBC’s commitment to transparency and sustainability, potentially strengthening its market position and stakeholder trust.

More about Coca Cola HBC

Coca-Cola HBC is a growth-focused consumer packaged goods business and a strategic bottling partner of The Coca-Cola Company. It offers a wide range of beverages, including sparkling drinks, juices, water, sports drinks, energy drinks, ready-to-drink tea, coffee, and premium spirits. The company serves 750 million consumers across 29 countries and is committed to sustainability and socio-economic development. Coca-Cola HBC is listed on the London Stock Exchange and the Athens Exchange.
